candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicated total row.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; suitable fallback if primary label is missing in some years.
Liability, not sales/revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct match to cost of sales / COGS.
Related direct cost line; possible alternate label over time, though likely a component or adjusted version given separate inventory write-down row.
Inventory asset component, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Using COGS labels as a priority list; 'Cost of goods sold' is preferred.

candidates.why: Valid overhead component and strong SG&A candidate.
Can be an SG&A component if not already included elsewhere, but often supplemental/disclosed separately.
Balance sheet item, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet item, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Wages and salaries, personal income taxes, social security costs, holiday pay, etc
candidates.why: Balance sheet payable, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly misses 'Staff costs', which is a major operating overhead component visible in the Income Statement. Selected component rows rather than totals/subtotals. Included 'Share-Based Remuneration' as an overhead component. Manual review requested because one chosen row was taken from the full A-column outside the candidate list, and share-based compensation may already be included within staff costs in some disclosures. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization and impairment excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization/impairment disclosure, but not the core R&D expense line.
Development amortization, not primary period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense disclosure; best match.
Balance sheet asset/liability item, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet project asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Amortization of Own development projects
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Own development projects in progress - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet/intangible asset category, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet item, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. Not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS because it is likely already embedded within the selected overhead buckets and separately disclosed for note purposes.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; good fallback if specific interest line is unavailable.
Finance-cost component but less comprehensive than interest expense.
Most semantically correct interest expense label; preferred even though preview values are blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific interest component related to leases; narrower than total interest expense.
Balancing/total line and should not be preferred over direct labels.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Using a priority list headed by the explicit interest label; later code should take the first non-missing value by year.

candidates.row_label: Fair Value Adjustment Transaction in Equity
candidates.why: Not book equity; an OCI/equity adjustment item.
Direct balance sheet equity line; best available book equity measure.
Could include minority interest, so inferior to plain Equity when MIB is separate.
Entire balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners equity line is shown, so 'Equity' is the best BE choice.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest label, but appears unpopulated across preview years.
Combined total would double count if used for MIB.

variables.notes: No clear non-controlling interest balance is reported; using empty mapping so MIB is treated as 0 and avoids double counting with BE.
